name: file_read
description: Read content from a specified file, with optional line range and line numbering (line number 1-based).

file_path.description: The absolute path of the file to read.

start_line.description: The line number to start reading from (inclusive).

end_line.description: The line number to stop reading at (inclusive).

line_number.description: If true, prepend each line with its line number ('line_number→content').
